message:
feat(cx): integrate FABRIC capability registry and fix scope join lifetime safety

Two changes to the Cx (capability context) subsystem:

- cx.rs (+215 lines): Integrate FabricCapabilityRegistry into CxHandles
  behind the messaging-fabric feature gate. Imports capability types
  (FabricCapability, FabricCapabilityGrant, PublishPermit, SubscribeToken,
  etc.), DeliveryClass, CapabilityTokenSchema, and SubjectPattern.
  CxHandles now carries an Arc<FabricCapabilityRegistry> initialized
  to default in Cx::new(). This enables any task holding a Cx to
  check publish/subscribe permissions against the FABRIC capability
  system without threading a separate registry handle.

- scope.rs: Fix join_pair and join_all to avoid holding mutable
  references across await points. Previously called h.join(cx).await
  sequentially which moved the borrow into the future. Now creates
  all join futures upfront, then polls them via Pin::new(), ensuring
  the TaskHandle borrows are properly scoped. join_all parameter
  changed from Vec<TaskHandle<T>> to mut Vec<TaskHandle<T>> since
  iter_mut() is needed to create futures before awaiting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
